note: SHA256 of LFS binaries (sam3.pt, sam3.1_multiplex.pt) is recorded during the offline packaging step that runs `huggingface-cli download` with HF_TOKEN. Until then, integrity is anchored on the HF revision SHA below. Removed heads stay out of this manifest: Prithvi, RemoteCLIP, FAIR1M-OBB detector, and generic IDEA Grounding-DINO. The grounding_dino runtime layer calls the separate inference-lae sidecar.

1038lab/sam3.note: Non-gated mirror of facebook/sam3 weights. Activated by SAM3_WEIGHTS_SOURCE=mirror. Tokenizer/processor configs are still loaded from the upstream sam3 Python package shipped in the container.

ultralytics/assets/mobileclip2_b.ts.license: Apple ML-MobileCLIP research license — see https://github.com/apple/ml-mobileclip
ultralytics/assets/mobileclip2_b.ts.note: TorchScript text encoder (~242 MB) used by YOLOE in text-prompt mode. Ultralytics' build_text_model() pulls it via attempt_download_asset() the first time YOLOE.set_classes() runs and writes it to CWD by default — which is the bind-mounted /app at runtime, leaking the asset onto the host. The Dockerfile pre-stages it under /models/torch/ultralytics and inference-sam3/yoloe.py patches attempt_download_asset to resolve it from that path. Override with MOBILECLIP2_TS_PATH if you stage it elsewhere.

mvrsd/mvrsd_yolo11m.license: Operator-supplied fine-tune of Ultralytics yolo11m on the Military Vehicle Remote Sensing Dataset (MVRSD). 5 classes: SMV, LMV, AFV, CV, MCV.
mvrsd/mvrsd_yolo11m.note: Axis-aligned YOLO detect specialist for sub-meter (~0.3 m GSD) optical RGB military scenes. Default-ON in the imagery_rgb profile when SAM3_LOAD_MVRSD=1 and only skipped when enabled_layers is a non-empty list that omits mvrsd. Trained weights are hosted as a GitHub release asset; the orchestrator sets the MVRSD_WEIGHTS_URL build ARG to that asset URL. The Dockerfile.gpu bake step curls it to /models/mvrsd/mvrsd_yolo11m.pt at build time (project hard rule #8: no runtime downloads). When MVRSD_WEIGHTS_URL is empty the bake step is a no-op and mvrsd.load() honour-gates (returns model=None), so existing builds do not break. Runtime path overridable via MVRSD_WEIGHTS_PATH.
